channel.title: Sagar Biswas Blog
channel.description: Security awareness posts and software engineering reflections by Sagar Biswas — covering cybersecurity, ethical hacking, and full-stack development.

image.title: Sagar Biswas Blog
image.description: Sagar Biswas — Software Developer and Cybersecurity Enthusiast

item.title: Why Attackers Like the Temp Folder and How You Can Protect Your PC | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: Why malware often uses the Windows Temp folder, what really happens during these attacks, and practical steps to reduce your risk.

item.title: Understanding OSI Layers Through Real Attack Examples | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: A practical OSI model walkthrough that maps each layer to real attack patterns and defensive habits for students and security beginners.

item.title: Quantum Computers vs Encryption | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: Quantum computers threaten current RSA and ECC encryption. NIST post-quantum standards exist today. Learn what organizations should do now.

item.title: Anonymity Is Not Absolute: What Works | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: Nation-state actors correlate metadata and behavior. VPNs and proxies help, but real anonymity depends on identity separation, fewer actions, and avoiding linked accounts.

item.title: Full-Page Screenshot in DevTools | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: A fast DevTools trick to capture a full-page screenshot in Chrome or Edge. No extensions, no hassle — just the Command Menu.

item.title: Printer Attack: The Silent Entry Point | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: How a network printer becomes the easiest entry point into a company network — and how to secure it before attackers do.

item.title: Vibe Coding: Tech Debt Explained | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: AI enables fast delivery but poor decisions create compounding complexity. A guide on what to keep and what to cut when using AI-assisted coding.

item.title: Wi-Fi Security Alert: MAC Blocking Is Not Enough | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: Blocking a device by MAC address is trivially bypassed on modern phones. Change your Wi-Fi password and tighten your router settings instead.

item.title: WSL2 + Kali Linux + Win-KeX Setup Guide | Sagar Biswas
item.author: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com (Sagar Biswas)
item.description: A beginner-friendly WSL2 + Kali Linux + Win-KeX setup guide with exact commands, prompt answers, screenshots, and common fixes.
